channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Drone attack on market in Sudan kills 11, as air war civilian toll mounts
item.description: More than 200 civilians killed in recent days as drone strikes tear through markets, schools and hospitals.

item.title: Iranian missile strike in central Israel sets building ablaze
item.description: Smoke and flames rising beside a road in central Israel after an Iranian missile attack, the Israeli army said.

item.title: Qatar’s interior minister says security situation ‘stable’ amid Iran war
item.description: Sheikh Khalifa bin Hamad says Qatar will 'not hesitate' to ensure its stability as US-Israeli war on Iran continues.

item.title: Israel destroys bridge in Lebanon and threatens Gaza-scale devastation
item.description: Israeli attacks since early March have killed 773 in Lebanon as military expands assault to more Beirut neighbourhoods.

item.title: What rats do’: US says Iranian leaders hiding as leaders appear in Tehran
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Iran’s leadership was “desperate and hiding,” after US-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Lebanese father buries four daughters killed in Israeli strike
item.description: A Lebanese father mourned the death of his four daughters, who were killed in an Israeli strike.

item.title: Success uncertain, but Israelis continue to back ‘heroic’ war with Iran
item.description: Israeli public overwhelmingly supports war with Iran, rallying behind Netanyahu despite political divisions.

item.title: Ukraine, EU allies slam US decision to roll back Russia oil sanctions
item.description: Volodymyr Zelenskyy says move 'does not help peace' as Europe reels from soaring energy prices linked to Iran war.

item.title: Ukraine finds new role as protector of US, Gulf allies amid Iran war
item.description: Having abandoned Ukraine, the US has sought Kyiv's support in defence from Iranian drones.

item.title: Thousands march worldwide in solidarity with Palestine, Iran on al-Quds Day
item.description: Despite war, al-Quds Day marches in Tehran saw thousands protest, voicing anger against Israel and the US.
